images.caption: ...then Mike Barrett rolls back and shoots
Dan Afoke give a good example of a defensive push, while Matt Schlegel and Dave Cluney cover their men
Will Dave Arnot go for that rather tempting top right, or maybe he'll feed to backdoor cutter just entering from the right? Actually, don't be silly - he's an attack man, he's shooting!
Dave Arnot goes for the bull dodge. Check looks a bit high mind.
Another dubious one - Dave Cluney gets one high one, and probably hit while he's down by #14
The EG attacker may have got past Mike Barrett, but he seems to have forgotten something
Might be a good time for Mike Barrett to dish the ball to an open Matt Payne
